candidates.why: Primary label for top-line revenue; duplicated by 'Total Revenue' with identical values. Choosing one consistent label.
Duplicate of 'Total revenues'; same figures. Either would work but one is sufficient.

variables.notes: Chose the first, more descriptive occurrence of the duplicate revenue total.
Direct cost of sales/COGS is not explicitly listed among candidates, so it is treated as missing for PROF mapping.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A-type overhead bucket; fits administrative expenses category.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit labor-related SG&A component; should be included as part of SG&A components.
Explicit SG&A other component; belongs fully in SG&A.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A component rows exist and none are totals/subtotals, so all three are included.
No R&D-related row is present in the candidate list; treat as zero for PROF.

candidates.why: Primary P&L interest expense line; best match for interest expense.
Component of interest expense, but less comprehensive than the main interest expense line.
Capitalised interest, not the main interest expense; not ideal as primary XINT.
Interest on leases; a component of total interest expense but not the aggregate.
Minor component of interest cost; not the main aggregate.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; not the main total.
Balance sheet debt, not interest expense; unsuitable for XINT.
Short-term debt balance, not period interest expense.

variables.notes: Chose the aggregate income statement interest expense line rather than components or balance sheet debt amounts.

candidates.row_label: Changes in fair value of equity investments
candidates.why: Income statement remeasurement item, not a stock of equity; not suitable for book equity.
Component of equity, but not total equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; valid book equity measure.
Also represents total equity and matches the balance sheet total; best single book equity figure.
Technical balancing row; should be excluded.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row for the equation; not pure equity.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not equity alone.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total equity balance-sheet line as book equity (BE).
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line is present among candidates.
